subject: Githyanki ambush count
fact: Two Githyanki warriors launched a surprise attack on the party.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors and a hidden Intellect Devourer launch a surprise attack

subject: Intellect Devourer count
fact: One hidden Intellect Devourer launched a surprise attack on the party.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors and a hidden Intellect Devourer launch a surprise attack

subject: Intellect Devourer legs
fact: The Intellect Devourer is a four-legged brain creature.

subject: Owlbear stun duration
fact: The Owlbear was incapacitated for a round after being stunned by the Intellect Devourer.
source_quote: leaving the sidekick incapacitated for a round

subject: Spirit Guardians radius
fact: The Spirit Guardians spell created a fifteen-foot radius of swirling spectral spirits.
source_quote: swirled around him in a fifteen-foot radius
